description: Returns the Permission Template names and IDs for the specified Company.

parameters.name: filters[type]
parameters.description: Allows filtering by template type. If none is provided, default is "project_tools". Allowed types = company_tools, project_tools, global. Example - ?filters[type]=company_tools

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: Returns detailed permission templates if view=with_permissions is specified.

id.description: The ID of the Permission Template

name.description: The name of the Permission Template

project_specific.description: If the Permission Template is project specific

category.description: The category of the Permission Template
